title: BIRTH CERTIFICATE AND OREGON ID CARD ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: CONGREGATIONS HELPING PEOPLE BIRTH CERTIFICATE AND OREGON ID CARD ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers payment assistance to obtain birth certificates or Oregon State identification. No assistance is available for expired ID cards. Assistance is limited to one time. 1977 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97303 Eligibility: Oregon ID: Individuals who are new to the state of Oregon or need a valid ID replaced. Birth certificate: Individuals with a verifiable business need Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 391-4365 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 391-4365 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of identity, utility bill in applicant's name, or registered mailing address in Salem LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation available Monday AREA SERVED: Marion County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Salvation Army building. Services: Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE TRANSPORTATION - LOCAL BUS PASS ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONGREGATIONS HELPING PEOPLE
